title: Mine.
content:
Mine by the right of the white election!
    Mine by the royal seal!
    Mine by the sign in the scarlet prison
    Bars cannot conceal!

    Mine, here in vision and in veto!
    Mine, by the grave's repeal
    Titled, confirmed, -- delirious charter!
    Mine, while the ages steal!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "Mine.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
